suggestion.rationale: All candidate edges involve corridors sharing the base street name 'Broadway' but differing in boroughs (Manhattan, Queens, Bronx) and/or street identity (Broadway vs Woodhaven/Cross Bay). The Identity Merge Canon explicitly forbids merging when boroughs differ, and also when limits or street names differ. No pair passes the Same-Object test (Test 2). All pairs are resolved as do_not_merge under Decision Test 1 (Contradiction test) and the per-kind corridor rule. No ambiguity exists.
